LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NEW YORK LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY MOTION FOR INTERPLEADER, DISCHARGE AND DISMISSAL. THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCE, THE COURT BELIEVES THAT DISMISSAL IS APPROPRIATE, AND MOOTS THE DISCHARGE. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-02-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Interpleader, Discharge And Dismissal
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Collette Tesauro, of Brown Law Group, Tel. 619.330.1700, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NEW YORK LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY Motion For Interpleader, Discharge And Dismissal is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Under the circumstance, the Court believes that dismissal is appropriate, and moots the discharge. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
